entities:
RAG | CONCEPT | Retrieval-Augmented Generation — a method combining parametric and non-parametric memory for language generation
Patrick Lewis | PERSON | Lead author of the RAG paper at Facebook AI Research
Facebook AI Research | ORGANIZATION | AI research division of Meta that authored the RAG paper
University College London | ORGANIZATION | UK academic institution co-authoring the RAG paper
New York University | ORGANIZATION | US academic institution co-authoring the RAG paper
Wikipedia | PRODUCT | Open-access encyclopedia used as the non-parametric memory corpus in RAG
seq2seq | CONCEPT | Sequence-to-sequence model architecture used as the parametric memory component in RAG
RAG-Sequence | CONCEPT | RAG variant that uses the same retrieved passages throughout the full generation
RAG-Token | CONCEPT | RAG variant that allows different retrieved passages at each generation token
open-domain QA | CONCEPT | Question answering task requiring retrieval over large unstructured knowledge sources
relations:
